description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and white exterior walls, set on a rectangular green lawn. The front features a covered porch with white columns, steps leading up to the entryway, and a short white fence enclosing a small garden. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, and a driveway leads to a side garage. The backyard includes a patio area, additional landscaping, and a small outbuilding or gazebo. Mature trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, enhancing its residential charm.
description: A two-story white house with a gray gable roof, covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a driveway leading to a side garage, set on a landscaped green lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with columns, main entry steps, symmetrical windows, driveway, and front garden with a white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, side windows, and backyard patio area with additional landscaping and a small outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, smaller windows, and a landscaped backyard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the house, backyard, fencing, and mature trees on the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with white columns, steps, and a decorative front door framed by sidelights.
